query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] The agents committed their own changes. The crate files are already in history. Wave 2 — spawning the search.rs Step 6d agent.
[tool: Bash(git log --oneline -5 && git show --stat HEAD~1 | head -20) → 948f890 impl: wave 1 — graph_ppr + config PPR fields (#398)
5b47959 impl(graph_ppr): add personalized_pagerank pure function with power iteration and 20 unit tests (crt-030)
c506a01 impl(config): add five PPR fields to InferenceConfig with validation and tests (crt-030)
0ce8202 pseudocode: crt-030]
[tool: Bash(git status crates/ --short) → (Bash completed with no output)]
[tool: Bash(git diff --stat HEAD crates/ && ls crates/unimatrix-engine/src/graph_ppr*.rs 2>/dev/null && ls crates/unimatrix-server/s) → crates/unimatrix-engine/src/graph_ppr.rs
crates/unimatrix-engine/src/graph_ppr_tests.rs
crates/unimatrix-server/src/infra/config.rs]
[Assistant] The crate files aren't tracked yet. Let me check and add them.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
ADR-001 crt-030: graph_ppr.rs as Submodule of graph.rs
Wave structure for multi-component features: parallel independent components first, sequential dependents second
SM must commit all in-flight working tree diffs before invoking gate validators
